headline: Blurred Vision? See an Eye Specialist in Chennai
subheadline: Blurred vision can have many causes -- Dr. Rajeswari will identify the real cause, not just guess.
metaDescription: Experiencing blurred vision? See Dr. Rajeswari in KK Nagar, Chennai for a thorough evaluation. Call or book online.

whyPatientsChoose.title: We Find the Real Cause
whyPatientsChoose.description: A comprehensive evaluation, not a quick glasses prescription, to identify what's actually going on.

symptoms: Gradual blurring over weeks or months
Sudden blurred vision in one or both eyes
Blurred vision with glare or halos at night

processSteps.title: Vision & Refraction Test
processSteps.description: Checking whether a simple glasses prescription is the cause.

processSteps.title: Eye Health Examination
processSteps.description: Ruling out cataracts, retina conditions, or other underlying issues.

processSteps.title: Clear Next Steps
processSteps.description: Whether it's glasses, treatment, or reassurance -- you'll know what's going on.
